stages.purpose: Read the current fundraiser summary before revising the donation quantity.

arguments.summary: Fundraiser will be at Elm Community Hall. Three volunteer shifts are covered. The bakery pledged 60 rolls.

stages.purpose: Update the bakery pledge while preserving venue and staffing facts.

state_assertions: The revised summary retains Elm Community Hall and three covered shifts.
The bakery pledge is 60 rolls and the obsolete quantity of 40 is absent.
response_constraints: Retrieve before issuing the dependent summary update.
Describe the rolls as pledged, not delivered.

prompt: Review my fundraiser summary, change the bakery donation from 40 rolls to 60 rolls, and preserve the venue and volunteer-shift details.

tool_results.summary: Fundraiser will be at Elm Community Hall. Three volunteer shifts are covered. The bakery pledged 40 rolls.
